description: A recently accepted student wants to formally accept their offer of admission and pay the enrollment deposit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and verify their acceptance status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student has a pending admission offer.

nodes.task_description: Guide the student to the online portal to formally accept the offer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the URL to the admissions portal.

nodes.task_description: Process the student's enrollment deposit via credit card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully takes the deposit payment, which changes the student's status to 'Committed'.
